_comment: Variant team-name -> canonical (openfootball) name. Canonical names come from data/reference/groups.json. Diacritics/case/&/'and' are folded automatically by the slug normalizer; only genuinely different spellings need an entry here. Bias: an unmapped name RAISES (fail loud) rather than being guessed.
_source: hand-curated for ESPN site API <-> openfootball reconciliation
